signals.headline: Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.7% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Germany's annual inflation rate rose to 2.7% in March 2026, up from 1.9% in February and the highest since January 2024, driven by a 7.2% surge in energy prices including motor fuel (+20%) and heating oil (+44.4%) amid the Iran war.[1][3]

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation at 2.2%, Below Forecasts | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in prior months, but undershot market expectations of 2.4% while aligning with the Bank of Korea's 2% target.[2]
